scripts.publish:check: npm run git:conflicts && npm run check:tsconfig-modern && npm run check:ts-source-integrity && node scripts/verify-ts-script-mirrors.js && node scripts/verify-ts-frontend-mirrors.js && node scripts/verify-ts-backend-mirrors.js && node scripts/verify-ts-feature-visibility-preview-runtime.js && node scripts/verify-ts-energy-flow-mirrors.js && node scripts/verify-ts-customer-feature-visibility.js && node scripts/verify-ts-feature-visibility-shadow.js && node scripts/verify-ts-shadow-bridges.js && node scripts/verify-ts-feature-visibility-shadow-hook.js && node scripts/verify-publish.js
scripts.test:types: npm run check:tsconfig-modern && npm run check:ts-source-syntax && npm run check:ts-source-integrity && npm run verify:ts-scaffold && npm run test:ts-script-mirrors && npm run test:ts-frontend-mirrors && npm run test:ts-backend-mirrors && npm run test:frontend-mirror-runtime && npm run test:api-state-feature && npm run test:api-state-feature-runtime && npm run test:backend-api-state && npm run test:energy-flow-utils && npm run test:energy-flow-resolver && npm run test:energy-flow-mirrors && npm run test:energy-flow-regression && npm run test:energy-flow-regression-runtime && npm run test:ems-budget-heating-rod && npm run test:ems-budget-heating-rod-runtime && npm run test:adapter-state-api && npm run test:adapter-state-api-runtime && npm run test:backend-api-state && npm run test:backend-api-state-runtime && npm run test:feature-visibility-resolver && npm run test:feature-visibility-resolver-runtime && npm run test:feature-visibility-shadow && npm run test:feature-visibility-shadow-runtime && npm run test:frontend-display && npm run test:feature-visibility-resolver && npm run test:feature-visibility-resolver-runtime && npm run test:feature-visibility-shadow && npm run test:feature-visibility-shadow-runtime && npm run test:frontend-display-runtime && npm run test:customer-feature-visibility && npm run test:customer-feature-visibility-runtime && npm run typecheck && npm run test:shadow-bridges && npm run test:contracts
scripts.test:all: npm run publish:check && npm run test:types && npm run check:ts-source-syntax
scripts.release:check: npm run test:all && npm run build:ts && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.ci:check: npm run test:all && npm run build:ts && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.build:ts: npm run clean:ts && npm run sync:ts-scripts && npm run sync:ts-frontend-mirrors && npm run sync:ts-backend-mirrors && npm run sync:ts-energy-flow-mirrors && npm run sync:ts-shadow-bridges && npm run build:types
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:ts
scripts.test:energy-flow-regression-runtime: npm run clean:ts && tsc -p tsconfig.energy-flow-regression.json && node build-ts/energy-flow-regression/tests/energy-flow-regression-runtime.js
scripts.test:ems-budget-heating-rod-runtime: npm run clean:ts && tsc -p tsconfig.ems-budget-heating-rod.json && node build-ts/ems-budget-heating-rod/tests/ems-budget-heating-rod-runtime.js
scripts.test:adapter-state-api-runtime: npm run clean:ts && tsc -p tsconfig.adapter-state-api.json && node build-ts/adapter-state-api/tests/adapter-state-api-runtime.js
scripts.test:api-state-feature-runtime: npm run clean:ts && tsc -p tsconfig.api-state-feature.json && node build-ts/api-state-feature/tests/api-state-feature-runtime.js
scripts.test:backend-api-state-runtime: npm run clean:ts && tsc -p tsconfig.backend-api-state.json && node build-ts/backend-api-state/tests/backend-api-state-runtime.js
scripts.test:repo: npm run check:conflicts && npm run repo:conflict-check && npm run publish:check
scripts.test:frontend-display-runtime: npm run clean:ts && tsc -p tsconfig.frontend-display.json && node build-ts/frontend-display/tests/frontend-display-runtime.js
scripts.test:frontend-mirrors: npm run test:ts-frontend-mirrors && npm run test:frontend-mirror-runtime
scripts.test:customer-feature-visibility-runtime: npm run clean:ts && tsc -p tsconfig.customer-feature-visibility.json && node build-ts/customer-feature-visibility/tests/customer-feature-visibility-runtime.js
scripts.test:feature-visibility-resolver-runtime: npm run clean:ts && tsc -p tsconfig.feature-visibility-resolver.json && node build-ts/feature-visibility-resolver/tests/feature-visibility-resolver-runtime.js
scripts.test:feature-visibility-runtime: npm run clean:ts && tsc -p tsconfig.frontend-feature-visibility.json && node build-ts/frontend-feature-visibility/tests/frontend-feature-visibility-runtime.js
scripts.test:ts-resolver-mirrors: npm run test:energy-flow-mirrors && npm run test:feature-visibility-resolver
scripts.test:resolver-mirror-runtime: npm run test:energy-flow-regression-runtime && npm run test:feature-visibility-resolver-runtime
scripts.test:resolver-mirrors: npm run test:ts-resolver-mirrors && npm run test:resolver-mirror-runtime
scripts.test:feature-visibility-shadow-runtime: npm run clean:ts && tsc -p tsconfig.feature-visibility-shadow.json && node build-ts/feature-visibility-shadow/tests/feature-visibility-shadow-runtime.js
